mapper.select: SELECT -- 根据统计维度格式化时间（日/周/月） CASE WHEN #{statDimension} = 'DAY' THEN DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{statDimension} = 'WEEK' THEN CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(submit_time, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(submit_time) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 至 ', DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(submit_time, INTERVAL 6 - WEEKDAY(submit_time) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') ) WHEN #{statDimension} = 'MONTH' THEN DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m') END AS time_key, -- 时间维度的 key（对应 Map 的 key） COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS submit_count -- 提交人数（去重，避免同一学生多次提交） FROM paper_submit WHERE -- 时间范围筛选 DATE(submit_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- 专业筛选（非空才加条件） AND major_id = #{majorId} -- 年级筛选（非空才加条件） AND grade = #{grade} -- 软删除：只查未删除的记录 AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY -- 按格式化后的时间分组 CASE WHEN #{statDimension} = 'DAY' THEN DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{statDimension} = 'WEEK' THEN CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(submit_time, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(submit_time) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 至 ', DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(submit_time, INTERVAL 6 - WEEKDAY(submit_time) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') ) WHEN #{statDimension} = 'MONTH' THEN DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m') END ORDER BY -- 按时间升序排列 CASE WHEN #{statDimension} = 'DAY' THEN DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{statDimension} = 'WEEK' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(submit_time, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(submit_time) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{statDimension} = 'MONTH' THEN DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m') END ASC

SELECT ps.id AS paperId, ps.paper_title AS paperTitle, ps.paper_type AS paperType, ps.submit_status AS submitStatus, -- 状态描述：1=待指导，2=指导中，3=指导完成 CASE ps.submit_status WHEN 1 THEN '待指导' WHEN 2 THEN '指导中' WHEN 3 THEN '指导完成' ELSE '其他' END AS submitStatusDesc, ps.student_id AS studentId, su.real_name AS studentName, -- 关联学生表获取姓名 su.username AS studentNo, -- 假设 username 存储学号 ps.submit_time AS submitTime, ps.advisor_assign_time AS advisorAssignTime, ps.advisor_suggestion AS advisorSuggestion, ps.advisor_score AS advisorScore FROM paper_submit ps -- 关联 sys_user 表（学生信息）：ps.student_id = su.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ps.student_id = su.id AND su.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.advisor_id = #{advisorId} -- 筛选当前教师的任务 AND ps.is_deleted = 0 -- 过滤已删除的论文
AND ps.submit_status = #{status} -- 可选：按状态筛选
ORDER BY ps.advisor_assign_time DESC -- 按分配时间倒序（最新任务在前）
